title: Cascaded IMU Attitude Stabiliser
description: Quadrotor attitude controller reading ICM-42688-P at 1 kHz, estimating roll/pitch via complementary filter, running cascaded rate/attitude PID loops from pid_heater_control, driving 4 ESCs via PWM, decoding RC PPM input, and disarming on attitude-exceed or IMU timeout fault.
objective: Hold roll/pitch within ±1° of RC setpoint; disarm on |attitude|>45° or IMU read timeout; log attitude at 100 Hz via UART.
constraints: Arduino Due or Teensy 4.0; ICM-42688-P SPI CS=10; 4 ESCs on pins 3/5/6/9; PPM RC receiver on INT4; 3S LiPo.
supporting_fact_titles: Complementary Filter for IMU Attitude Estimation
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.ICM-42688-P High-Rate IMU via SPI: 1 kHz gyro+accel feed to complementary filter; SPI fault triggers immediate ESC disarm.
element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Outer attitude loop commands inner rate loop; outputs per-motor thrust mix via pid_heater_control.
element_usage_notes.4-Channel ESC PWM Signal Driver: Receives mixed motor commands 1000-2000 µs; disarms to 1000 µs on fault.
element_usage_notes.RC PPM Receiver Decoder: Decodes pilot roll/pitch/yaw/throttle setpoints at 50 Hz from PPM-sum signal.

element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Complementary filter output feeds cascaded outer and inner PID loops.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: PID output mixed to per-motor 1000-2000 µs ESC commands.

element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Pilot stick inputs set attitude setpoints each 20 ms.
IMU timeout triggers immediate ESC disarm to 1000 µs on all channels.
